createVideoSynthesisTask.heading_zh: 创建视频生成任务 createVideoSynthesisTask
createVideoSynthesisTask.desc_en: Submit an asynchronous text-to-video or image-to-video generation job on one of the Wan models and get back a `task_id` to poll with `getVideoSynthesisTask`. The async header must be enabled, and image-to-video models differ in how the reference image is supplied (`input.img_url` vs `input.media`).
createVideoSynthesisTask.description_zh: 在某个 Wan 模型上提交异步的文生视频或图生视频任务，返回可交给 getVideoSynthesisTask 轮询的 task_id。需开启异步请求头，且不同图生视频模型传参考图的字段不同（input.img_url 与 input.media）。

getVideoSynthesisTask.heading_zh: 查询视频生成任务结果 getVideoSynthesisTask
getVideoSynthesisTask.desc_en: Poll the status and result of a job created by `createVideoSynthesisTask`. Read `output.task_status` to tell lifecycle states apart; on success the playable video URL appears in `output.video_url`.
getVideoSynthesisTask.description_zh: 轮询由 createVideoSynthesisTask 创建的任务的状态与结果。通过 output.task_status 区分各生命周期状态，成功后可在 output.video_url 取到视频地址。

X-DashScope-Async.desc_en: Switches the request into asynchronous task mode, which is the only mode this endpoint runs in.
X-DashScope-Async.title_zh: 将请求切换为异步任务模式，也是该接口唯一支持的模式。

model.desc_en: Selects which Wan generation model handles the job; the suffix distinguishes text-to-video from image-to-video, and the two image-to-video variants take the reference image through different fields.
model.title_zh: 选择由哪个 Wan 模型来处理任务；后缀区分文生视频与图生视频，两个图生视频变体通过不同字段传入参考图。

input.desc_en: Container for the generation inputs (prompt and optional reference image/audio).
input.title_zh: 生成输入的容器（提示词及可选的参考图、参考音频）。

input.prompt.desc_en: Text describing the video to generate; must contain actual words, as empty or whitespace-only prompts are rejected upstream.
input.prompt.title_zh: 描述要生成视频的文本提示词；必须包含实际词语，纯空白会被上游拒绝。

input.negative_prompt.desc_en: Text describing what to keep out of the generated video.
input.negative_prompt.title_zh: 描述希望在生成视频中避免出现的内容。

input.img_url.desc_en: URL of the reference image for the `wan2.6-i2v` image-to-video model; text-to-video models ignore it, and `wan2.7-i2v` uses `input.media` instead.
input.img_url.title_zh: wan2.6-i2v 图生视频模型的参考图链接；文生视频模型会忽略它，wan2.7-i2v 改用 input.media。

input.media.desc_en: Reference image URLs supplied as an array, used by the `wan2.7-i2v` image-to-video model; do not use `input.img_url` with that model.
input.media.title_zh: 以数组形式传入的参考图链接，供 wan2.7-i2v 图生视频模型使用；该模型不要改用 input.img_url。

input.audio_url.desc_en: URL of an optional reference audio track.

parameters.desc_en: Container for generation tuning options such as resolution, duration, and seed.
parameters.title_zh: 生成调节项的容器，如分辨率、时长、随机种子等。

parameters.resolution.desc_en: Output resolution of the generated video.
parameters.resolution.title_zh: 生成视频的输出分辨率。

parameters.duration.desc_en: Length of the generated clip, in seconds.
parameters.duration.title_zh: 生成片段的时长，单位为秒。

parameters.shot_type.desc_en: Whether the output is a single continuous shot or stitched from multiple shots.
parameters.shot_type.title_zh: 输出为单一连续镜头还是由多个镜头拼接。

parameters.watermark.desc_en: Whether to overlay a watermark on the generated video.
parameters.watermark.title_zh: 是否在生成视频上叠加水印。

parameters.seed.desc_en: Random seed controlling generation; reusing the same seed with identical inputs reproduces the same output.
parameters.seed.title_zh: 控制生成的随机种子；在相同输入下复用同一种子可复现相同结果。

output.desc_en: Container for the newly created task's identifier and initial status.
output.title_zh: 新建任务的标识与初始状态的容器。

output.task_id.desc_en: Identifier of the created task; pass it to `getVideoSynthesisTask` to poll for the result.
output.task_id.title_zh: 所创建任务的标识，传给 getVideoSynthesisTask 轮询结果。

output.task_status.desc_en: Lifecycle status of the task right after creation, before processing begins.
output.task_status.title_zh: 任务创建之后、开始处理之前的生命周期状态。

request_id.desc_en: Identifier of this API call, useful for tracing and support.
request_id.title_zh: 本次接口调用的标识，便于追踪与排障。

task_id.desc_en: Identifier of the task to query, as returned by `createVideoSynthesisTask`; unrecognized IDs come back with an unknown status rather than an error.
task_id.title_zh: 要查询的任务标识，由 createVideoSynthesisTask 返回；无法识别的 ID 会返回未知状态而非报错。

output.desc_en: Container for the task's current status and, once finished, its result or failure details.
output.title_zh: 任务当前状态的容器，任务结束后还含结果或失败详情。

output.task_status.desc_en: Current lifecycle status of the task; drives whether you keep polling, read the result, or inspect the failure fields.
output.task_status.title_zh: 任务当前的生命周期状态；据此决定继续轮询、读取结果还是查看失败字段。

output.video_url.desc_en: Link to the generated video, present once the task succeeds; it is short-lived, so download and persist the video promptly.
output.video_url.title_zh: 生成视频的链接，任务成功后才出现；该链接有效期短，请尽快下载并自行保存。

output.orig_prompt.desc_en: The original prompt as stored by the upstream provider.
output.orig_prompt.title_zh: 上游服务保存的原始提示词。

output.scheduled_time.desc_en: When the task was scheduled for execution.
output.scheduled_time.title_zh: 任务被调度执行的时间。

output.end_time.desc_en: When the task reached a terminal state.

output.code.desc_en: Machine-readable error code, present when the task failed.
output.code.title_zh: 机器可读的错误码，任务失败时出现。

output.message.desc_en: Human-readable failure reason, present when the task failed.
output.message.title_zh: 可读的失败原因，任务失败时出现。

usage.desc_en: Container for resource-usage figures, present once the task succeeds.
usage.title_zh: 资源用量数据的容器，任务成功后出现。

usage.input_video_duration.desc_en: Duration of any input video reference, in seconds; zero when no input video was provided.
usage.input_video_duration.title_zh: 输入视频参考的时长（秒），未提供输入视频时为 0。

usage.output_video_duration.desc_en: Duration of the generated video, in seconds.
usage.output_video_duration.title_zh: 生成视频的时长，单位为秒。

usage.duration.desc_en: The duration figure used as the basis for billing.
usage.duration.title_zh: 用作计费依据的时长数值。

usage.video_count.desc_en: Number of videos produced by the task.

usage.size.desc_en: Actual pixel dimensions of the generated video, given as width by height.
usage.size.title_zh: 生成视频的实际像素尺寸，以宽乘高的形式给出。

usage.ratio.desc_en: Aspect ratio of the generated video.

usage.SR.desc_en: Super-resolution output height the video was upscaled to.
usage.SR.title_zh: 视频经超分辨率放大后的输出高度。

request_id.desc_en: Identifier of this API call, useful for tracing and support.
request_id.title_zh: 本次接口调用的标识，便于追踪与排障。
